testcase.name: local-persistence › 29. Local persistence / Seeded offline pages :: edits on an offline seeded page survive refresh and remain editable afterwards
local-persistence › 29. Local persistence / Local pages :: a locally created page survives refresh and can be reopened with its content intact
harness-coverage › 15. Read-only Rendering / Block rendering :: read-only mode renders the main block families correctly
harness-coverage › 15. Read-only Rendering / Hierarchy and containers :: callout and quote children remain rendered inside their read-only containers
harness-coverage › 15. Read-only Rendering / Toggle and numbering :: read-only toggles still expand or collapse and numbered lists reset by context
harness-coverage › 26. Media blocks / Placeholder rendering :: media blocks without an asset show their placeholder preview
